    - uses: ./.github/actions/setup_linux_env
    - uses: ./.github/actions/build_debug

    steps:

    - uses: actions/checkout@v6
    - uses: ./.github/actions/setup_macos_env
    - uses: ./.github/actions/build_debug
    - uses: ./.github/actions/run_test_py

    runs-on: windows-8-core
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v6
    - uses: ./.github/actions/setup_windows_env
    - uses: ./.github/actions/build_debug
    - uses: ./.github/actions/run_test_py

name: Setup Linux environment
description: Setup Linux environment
runs:
  using: composite
  steps:
  - uses: SebRollen/toml-action@v1.2.0
    id: read_rust_toolchain
    with:
      file: rust-toolchain
      field: toolchain.channel
  - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@v1
    with:
      toolchain: ${{ steps.read_rust_toolchain.outputs.value }}
      components: clippy
  - run: sudo apt-get update
    shell: bash
  - run: sudo apt-get install opam libzstd-dev python3-pip erlang
    shell: bash
  - uses: haskell-actions/setup@v2
    with:
      ghc-version: '9.10.1'
  - name: Install uv
    uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
  - name: Install conan
    run: uv tool install conan==1.*
    shell: bash
  - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
    with:
      cache: false
      go-version: '~1.22.0'

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    git \
    opam \
    libzstd-dev \
    python3-pip \
    erlang \
    wget \
    sudo \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain nightly-2026-01-18
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

RUN rustup component add clippy

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    software-properties-common \
    && add-apt-repository ppa:alex-p/tesseract-ocr-dev -y \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    ghc \
    cabal-install \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -L https://downloads.haskell.org/~ghcup/x86_64-linux-ghcup > /tmp/ghcup && \
    chmod +x /tmp/ghcup && \
    /tmp/ghcup install ghc 9.10.1 --isolate /opt/ghc/9.10.1 --force

ENV PATH="/opt/ghc/9.10.1/bin:${PATH}"

RUN curl -L https://go.dev/dl/go1.22.0.linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar -xz -C /usr/local

ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:${PATH}"

RUN pip install uv

RUN uv tool install 'conan==1.*'

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    git \
    opam \
    libzstd-dev \
    python3-pip \
    erlang \
    wget \
    sudo \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \

    libgmp-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://get-ghcup.haskell.org | sh

ENV PATH="/root/.ghcup/bin:${PATH}"

RUN ghcup install ghc 9.10.1

RUN curl -L https://go.dev/dl/go1.22.0.linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar -xz -C /usr/local

ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:${PATH}"

RUN pip install uv

RUN uv tool install 'conan==1.*'

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    git \
    opam \
    libzstd-dev \
    python3-pip \
    erlang \
    wget \
    sudo \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain nightly-2026-01-18
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

RUN rustup component add clippy

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    software-properties-common \
    && add-apt-repository ppa:alex-p/tesseract-ocr-dev -y \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    ghc \
    cabal-install \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -L https://downloads.haskell.org/~ghcup/x86_64-linux-ghcup > /tmp/ghcup && \
    chmod +x /tmp/ghcup && \
    /tmp/ghcup install ghc 9.10.1 --isolate /opt/ghc/9.10.1 --force

ENV PATH="/opt/ghc/9.10.1/bin:${PATH}"

RUN curl -L https://go.dev/dl/go1.22.0.linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar -xz -C /usr/local

ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:${PATH}"

RUN pip install uv

RUN uv tool install 'conan==1.*'

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
